seoTitle: Kings Plains vs Kings Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kings Plains and Kings Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kings Plains vs Kings Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kings Plains and Kings Point.
heading: Kings Plains vs Kings Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kings Plains, New South Wales and Kings Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kings Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Kings Point (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kings Plains or Kings Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kings Plains has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Kings Point scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kings Plains scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Kings Point scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kings Plains or Kings Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kings Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
